author: omerfirmak
content:
Another similar edge case that could be optimized, about SELFDESTRUCT with 0 value this time. You can see it in `tests/tangerine_whistle/eip150_operation_gas_costs/test_eip150_selfdestruct.py::test_selfdestruct_to_precompile_state_access_boundary`

Since the value is 0, beneficiery account is not required to be accessed, but BAL includes it unconditionally.
